# GuidesForge - AI-Powered Guide Creation Platform
# https://guidesforge.org

## About
GuidesForge is an AI-powered platform that transforms screen recordings into four simultaneous outputs: narrated MP4 videos, step-by-step screenshot documentation, in-app interactive tours (Driver.js), and auto-published help center pages.

## Key Features
- Chrome extension for passive click recording (rrweb + screenshot capture)
- AI narration via GPT-4o-mini + Kokoro TTS
- Voice cloning via Chatterbox (23 languages)
- Staleness detection via nightly Playwright screenshot comparison
- Semantic search help widget (pgvector embeddings)
- Collaborative editing with Tiptap
- SDK for in-app tours and help widgets

## Pricing
- Free: $0/forever (10 guides/month)
- Starter: $15/month (100 guides/month)
- Pro: $39/month (unlimited guides, voice cloning, 5 seats)
- Business: $99/month (white-label, 10 seats, custom domain, SSO)
- Enterprise: Custom pricing

## Contact
- Website: https://guidesforge.org
- Support: support@guidesforge.org

## API
- Base URL: https://guidesforge.org/api
- Documentation: https://guidesforge.org/api/docs
